headline: Evaluating SLB (NYSE:SLB) After ChampionX Integration Progress And Recent Share Price Momentum
summary: Recent performance snapshot SLB (SLB) has drawn investor attention after a period where the stock is up about 5% over the past month and roughly 11% over the past 3 months, compared with its 1-day pullback of about 0.7%. See our latest analysis for SLB. Set against a strong year, with a 37.76% year to date share price return and a 62.55% 1 year total shareholder return, the recent 0.66% daily pullback looks more like a pause in what has been solid momentum. headline: How The SLB (SLB) Story Is Shifting As Analysts Rework Valuation And Risks
summary: SLB's implied fair value estimate has shifted from US$60.33 to US$61.39 per share, a modest change that still matters if you are tracking valuation closely. That move is landing at the same time as a wave of upward price target revisions from firms such as Goldman Sachs and JPMorgan, following fresh company guidance and new macro headlines. Read on to see how this evolving analyst narrative might shape the way you follow SLB from here. Analyst Price Targets don't always capture the full...
